name: Baseline mortgage documents (all clients)
description: Default English contract + KYC form for every mortgage client, before any country/language or risk-based overrides are layered on.

name: German-language contract & KYC for DE-resident accounts
description: Clients whose account was opened in Germany receive the German-language mortgage contract and KYC form instead of the English defaults.

name: Enhanced KYC for high-value mortgage loans
description: Loans above 500,000 or clients flagged high-risk require an additional enhanced KYC form on top of the standard one.

name: Sanctions-related jurisdiction disclosure
description: Adds a mandatory sanctions disclosure when the client's nationality is on the watch list, unless the account is domestic (DE), which is already covered by local enhanced KYC.
